summary: Designing and shipping backend services with Python, FastAPI, Docker, and Google Cloud Platform. Key focus areas: API reliability, deployment consistency, and engineering velocity through practical automation.
bullets: Build and maintain production FastAPI services running on Cloud Run with Cloud SQL-backed persistence.
Own cloud deployment workflows end-to-end — Docker image builds, CI/CD, environment parity, and rollback hygiene.
Reduce operational friction by automating data ingestion, internal tooling, and release steps that were previously manual.

receipt.detail: Shipped backend features that now back real product workflows in daily use.
